name: Prediction Market Arbitrage
description: Native-first ClawHub plugin for `prediction-market-arbitrage`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Query stocks, crypto, prediction markets, and portfolio research through AIsa. Use when: the user needs market data, screening, price history, or investment analysis. Supports research and analysis-ready outputs.

AISA_API_KEY.title: Aisa Api Key
AISA_API_KEY.description: Provide AISA_API_KEY for the packaged AIsa skill runtime.
